llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced at start of meeting: (1) Items 9.7, 9.8, 9.9, 9.10, 9.11, 9.12, and 9.13 (all second readings on policies) moved to consent; (2) Item 5.1 (staff recognition) added to agenda; (3) Item 8.4 (Employment Contract for Chief Business Official) moved to right after item 5.1 and prior to bond program items.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move those items?

items.intro_words: Okay. Good evening, everybody. Sorry for the delay.
